caption: Monthly balancing financial balance for Spain, TR 17.1.i. Expenses (blue) represent TSO payments to balancing-service providers; net income (red) represents imbalance-settlement receipts from BRPs. Net income jumps from ~€38M/mo pre-reform to €160M/mo at ISP15 (1 Dec 2024), reflecting the elimination of intra-hour imbalance netting; it moderates to €72M/mo at MTU15-DA as 15-min trading tools spread across markets.
